_comment: Dynamic regions masked for gate 2 (pixel diff). Each entry needs a reason (RUBRIC gate 2). Masks are painted flat magenta in baseline AND diff, so they contribute zero changed pixels. Adding a mask requires a JOURNAL entry. Populated empirically by the determinism acceptance test.

index.html.reason: Chart.js <canvas> elements render with sub-pixel/antialiasing variance between runs (determinism test showed 13 changed px here). Charts are not accessibility-fixable content; masking them isolates gate 2 to real layout.

charts.html.reason: Chart.js <canvas> elements render with sub-pixel/antialiasing variance between runs (determinism test showed 119 changed px here). Same rationale as index.html.
